sentences.speaker: Teacher + 4 Students
sentences.english: Q3eSE_RW0_U02_QClassroom
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Q3eSE_RW0_U02_QClassroom.mp3

sentences.speaker: Teacher:
sentences.english: Today we’re going to talk about the Unit Question
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Today we’re going to talk about the Unit Question.mp3

sentences.speaker: Teacher:
sentences.english: Can students learn in different ways?
sentences.arabic: هل يمكن للطلاب التعلم بطرق مختلفة؟
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Can students learn in different ways.mp3

sentences.speaker: Marcus:
sentences.english: Yes.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/yes.mp3

sentences.speaker: Teacher:
sentences.english: OK, Marcus, you go first
sentences.audio: assets/audio/OK Marcus  you go first.mp3

sentences.speaker: Teacher:
sentences.english: Why do you think students can learn in different ways?
sentences.arabic: لماذا تعتقد أن الطلاب يمكنهم التعلم بطرق مختلفة؟
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Why do you think students can learn in different ways.mp3

sentences.speaker: Marcus:
sentences.english: I don’t like sitting all day.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/I don’t like sitting all day.mp3

sentences.speaker: Marcus:
sentences.english: It’s OK in the winter, but I want to be able to move around.
sentences.arabic: إنه جيد في الشتاء، لكني أريد أن أتمكن من التحرك.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/It’s OK in the winter, but I want to be able to move around.mp3

sentences.speaker: Marcus:
sentences.english: It’s OK in the winter
sentences.audio: assets/audio/It’s OK in the winter.mp3

sentences.speaker: Marcus:
sentences.english: but I want to be able to move around.
sentences.arabic: لكن أريد أن أتمكن من التحرك بحرية.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/but I want to be able to move around.mp3

sentences.speaker: Teacher:
sentences.english: What do you think, uh, Yuna?
sentences.audio: assets/audio/What do you think, uh, Yuna.mp3

sentences.speaker: Teacher:
sentences.english: Can students learn in different ways?
sentences.arabic: هل يمكن للطلاب التعلم بطرق مختلفة؟
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Can students learn in different ways.mp3

sentences.speaker: Yuna:
sentences.english: No.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/no.mp3

sentences.speaker: Yuna:
sentences.english: I think it is important to sit down and pay attention in class
sentences.arabic: أعتقد أنه من المهم الجلوس والانتباه في الصف.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/I think it is important to sit down and pay attention in class.mp3

sentences.speaker: Teacher:
sentences.english: OK  What do you think, Felix?
sentences.audio: assets/audio/OK  What do you think, Felix.mp3

sentences.speaker: Teacher:
sentences.english: Can students learn in different kinds of schools?
sentences.arabic: هل يمكن للطلاب التعلم في أنواع مختلفة من المدارس؟
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Can students learn in different kinds of schools.mp3

sentences.speaker: Felix:
sentences.english: Maybe
sentences.audio: assets/audio/maybe.mp3

sentences.speaker: Felix:
sentences.english: I know about a school where the students are outside all day
sentences.arabic: أعرف عن مدرسة يكون فيها الطلاب خارج المبنى طوال اليوم.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/I know about a school where the students are outside all day.mp3

sentences.speaker: Felix:
sentences.english: That sounds good.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/That sounds good.mp3

sentences.speaker: Teacher:
sentences.english: So, two of you think students can learn differently
sentences.arabic: إذن، اثنان منكم يعتقدان أن الطلاب يمكن أن يتعلموا بشكل مختلف.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/So, two of you think students can learn differently.mp3

sentences.speaker: Teacher:
sentences.english: Uh, what do you think, Sophy.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/what do you think, Sophy.mp3

sentences.speaker: Sophy:
sentences.english: In my country, students spend a lot of time sitting down.
sentences.arabic: في بلدي، يقضي الطلاب الكثير من الوقت جالسين.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/In my country, students spend a lot of time sitting down.mp3

sentences.speaker: Sophy:
sentences.english: Maybe a new way of learning would be helpful
sentences.arabic: ربما تكون طريقة جديدة للتعلم مفيدة.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/Maybe a new way of learning would be helpful.mp3

sentences.speaker: Teacher:
sentences.english: Good point.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/good point.mp3

sentences.speaker: Teacher:
sentences.english: In different countries, students go to many different kinds of schools.
sentences.arabic: في دول مختلفة، يذهب الطلاب إلى أنواع كثيرة ومختلفة من المدارس.
sentences.audio: assets/audio/In different countries, students go to many different kinds of schools.mp3
